<div align="center">

```
 в–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–‘в–‘в–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–‘

 в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–‘в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘
 в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–‘в–‘в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв–‘в–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘
```

### `AI Engineer in the making В· Casablanca, Morocco`

![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=white)

---

## `> whoami`

Engineering student at **ENSAM MeknГЁs**, specializing in **AI & Industrial Data Systems**.
I started with competitive programming вҖ” graphs, dynamic programming, problems where efficiency is the point. That mindset carried into everything I build: clean pipelines, explainable models, and systems that do something real.

When I'm not writing code, I'm following what's happening with LLMs and generative AI, playing chess, or behind a camera.

---

## `> ls ./projects`

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ-0d1117?style=for-the-badge" />
